name.ja: 春鹿 今西清兵衛商店

description.en: Historic sake brewery established in 1884 in the heart of Naramachi. Sample five different sakes for ¥500 and keep the souvenir glass. English-speaking guides available.
description.ja: 1884年創業の奈良町の老舗酒蔵。500円で5種類の試飲ができ、グラスはお土産に。英語ガイド対応。

address.ja: 奈良県奈良市福智院町24-1

tips: 500 yen for 5 sake samples plus souvenir glass

description.en: Famous high-speed mochi pounding shop near Kintetsu Nara Station. Watch the mesmerizing mochi-pounding performance, then enjoy the freshly made yomogi mochi.
description.ja: 近鉄奈良駅近くの高速餅つきで有名な餅屋。迫力ある餅つきパフォーマンスを見て、つきたてのよもぎ餅を味わう。

tips: Mochi pounding happens at random intervals

description.en: Free museum recreating a traditional Naramachi merchant house. Beautifully restored lattice-front machiya with garden, showing how Nara merchants lived in the Edo period.
description.ja: 奈良町の伝統的な町家を再現した無料の資料館。格子造りの美しい町家と庭園で、江戸時代の商人の暮らしを体感。

address.ja: 奈良県奈良市元興寺町44

name.ja: カフェ わかくさ くるまざ

description.en: Charming renovated machiya cafe in quiet Naramachi backstreet. Known for matcha desserts and seasonal wagashi paired with Japanese tea in a traditional tatami setting.
description.ja: 奈良町の路地裏にある改装町家カフェ。畳の空間で抹茶スイーツや季節の和菓子と日本茶を楽しめる。

description.en: UNESCO World Heritage temple often overlooked by tourists rushing to Todai-ji. One of Japan's oldest temples with rare 6th-century roof tiles from the original Asuka-dera.
description.ja: 東大寺に急ぐ観光客に見逃されがちなユネスコ世界遺産の寺院。飛鳥寺から移築された6世紀の瓦が残る日本最古級の寺。

tips: Look for the ancient Asuka-era roof tiles

description.en: Flagship store of Nara's beloved textile brand, selling contemporary products made from traditional Nara sarashi hemp cloth. Beautiful furoshiki wraps, bags, and home goods.
description.ja: 奈良の伝統的な奈良晒の麻布を現代的にアレンジした人気テキスタイルブランドの本店。風呂敷やバッグ、生活雑貨が揃う。

address.ja: 奈良県奈良市元興寺町31-1

tips: Furoshiki wrapping cloths are signature items

description.en: Peaceful botanical garden within Kasuga Taisha grounds featuring plants mentioned in the ancient Manyoshu poetry anthology. Stunning wisteria displays in late April to early May.
description.ja: 春日大社境内にある万葉集に詠まれた植物を集めた植物園。4月下旬〜5月上旬の藤の花が見事。

address.ja: 奈良県奈良市春日野町160

spots.best_time: Late April - Early May for wisteria
tips: Much quieter than main shrine area

description.en: Hidden Meiji-era garden next to the famous Isuien Garden but far less visited. Three distinct garden styles — moss, tea ceremony, and pond — free for foreign visitors.
description.ja: 有名な依水園の隣にある明治時代の隠れた庭園。苔・茶花・池の3つの庭園があり、外国人は入園無料。

address.ja: 奈良県奈良市登大路町60-1

tips: Free admission for foreign passport holders
The moss garden is exceptional after rain

description.en: 150-year-old wagashi confectionery on Shimomikado Street. Traditional Japanese sweets handmade for tea ceremonies, including their famous migawarisaru monkey amulet-shaped treats.
description.ja: 下御門通りにある創業150年の和菓子店。茶道用の手作り和菓子で、身代わり猿の形をしたお菓子が名物。

tips: Can enjoy with tea on site

description.en: Museum showcasing Nara's traditional arts including Nara ink, calligraphy brushes, ceramics, lacquerware, and carved wooden masks. Regular workshops and craft demonstrations.
description.ja: 奈良墨、筆、陶芸、漆器、木彫面など奈良の伝統工芸を展示する博物館。定期的にワークショップや実演も開催。

address.ja: 奈良県奈良市阿字万字町1-1

tips: Nara ink and brushes make great souvenirs

description.en: Houses some of Japan's most important Buddhist sculptures including the iconic Ashura statue. Far fewer visitors than Todai-ji despite containing more national treasures.
description.ja: 阿修羅像など日本最重要の仏教彫刻を所蔵。東大寺より遥かに少ない来場者数ながら、より多くの国宝を収蔵。

address.ja: 奈良県奈良市登大路町48

tips: Combined ticket available with Eastern Golden Hall

description.en: Covered shopping arcade connecting Kintetsu Nara Station to Nara Park. Mix of souvenir shops, local restaurants, and deer-themed everything. Great for rainy day browsing.
description.ja: 近鉄奈良駅から奈良公園へ続くアーケード商店街。お土産店、地元の飲食店、鹿グッズが並ぶ。雨の日にも最適。

address.ja: 奈良県奈良市東向中町

description.en: Atmospheric thatched-roof tea house nestled in the forest path between Todai-ji and Kasuga Taisha. Warabi mochi and matcha surrounded by deer and ancient trees.
description.ja: 東大寺と春日大社を結ぶ森の小道にある茅葺き屋根の茶屋。鹿と古木に囲まれてわらび餅と抹茶を楽しめる。

address.ja: 奈良県奈良市春日野町30

description.en: Small 8th-century temple with dramatic clay statues of the Twelve Heavenly Generals. The fierce warriors surrounding the Buddha are some of Japan's finest ancient sculptures.
description.ja: 十二神将の迫力ある塑像で知られる8世紀の小寺院。仏を囲む勇猛な神将像は日本最高峰の古代彫刻。

tips: The clay warrior statues are breathtaking
Very few tourists compared to major temples

description.en: Craft brewery established in 2017 in Nara's old town. Small-batch beers brewed on-site with local Nara ingredients. Relaxed taproom in a renovated machiya townhouse.
description.ja: 2017年に奈良町に開業したクラフトビール醸造所。奈良の地元素材を使った少量生産ビール。改装町家のタップルーム。

address.ja: 奈良県奈良市東寺林町15

name.ja: 柿の葉すし たなか

description.en: Nara's signature dish — pressed sushi wrapped in persimmon leaves. This local chain preserves the traditional recipe using mackerel and salmon in aromatic kakinoha wrapping.
description.ja: 奈良名物の柿の葉すし。鯖と鮭を柿の葉で包んだ伝統的な製法を守る地元の名店。

address.ja: 奈良県奈良市東寺林町2

tips: Great portable snack for park picnic
Try the assorted box with both mackerel and salmon

description.en: Grass-covered hill offering panoramic views of Nara city and temples. Open for climbing mid-March to mid-December. Famous for the annual yamayaki grass-burning festival in January.
description.ja: 奈良市街と寺社を一望できる芝生の丘。3月中旬〜12月中旬に登山可能。1月の山焼きが有名。

tips: Three terraces with progressively better views
Deer roam freely on the slopes

description.en: Hidden kaiseki restaurant tucked deep in the primeval forest of Kasuga Taisha. Originally an imperial guesthouse, now serving refined multi-course Japanese cuisine in a forest setting.
description.ja: 春日大社の原始林の奥深くにある隠れた懐石料理店。元は迎賓館で、森の中で洗練された日本料理のコースを提供。

address.ja: 奈良県奈良市春日野町158

tips: Located deep in the forest — allow extra time to find it
Lunch course is more affordable than dinner
